rendered_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라
notes: BREAKTHROUGH vs iter15-17: iter15/16/17 (#1003/#1005/#1010) all FAIL_PROTOCOL with slot-created body-empty. iter18 FULL-RESEND progressive 3 chunks (A->B->D-full) at 2025B envelope SUCCESSFULLY rendered warning bubble with partial text. Engine accepted the 2025B envelope (no FAIL_SIZE_REJECT at this size — confirms acceptance vs iter14's 1747B reject point). However only first 2 chunks (A='[경고] 민감한 개인정보가' + B=' 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라') accumulated; the third chunk D-full containing '차단' did NOT render even after 50+s wait. Stop-button stays visible (stream not ended). Hypothesis confirmed: Vue3/Vuex4 state machine DOES accept progressive text accumulation (renders bubble + 2 chunks vs prior body-empty), validating the FULL-RESEND streaming model. Next iter should investigate why 3rd chunk drops: possible candidates include (1) chunk-spacing too fast for Vuex commit cycle, (2) D-full chunk parser still rejects payload, (3) ChatGLM SSE delta-vs-replace semantic still mismatched (third chunk should be FULL replace, not delta). Recommend iter19 test with (a) increased inter-chunk delay 50→200ms, or (b) explicit 'role:assistant' field on each chunk, or (c) inspect HAR replay to confirm 3rd FULL-RESEND chunk encoding matches what Vuex commit expects.
